CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, y FLOAT, x FLOAT);
CREATE TABLE compare_data (group_id INT, y FLOAT, x FLOAT);
SELECT group_id, corr(y, x) FROM compare_data GROUP BY group_id;
SELECT AVG(corr(y, x)) FROM (SELECT corr(y, x) AS correlation FROM compare_data GROUP BY group_id) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (id INT, y FLOAT, x FLOAT, category VARCHAR);
SELECT category, corr(y, x) FROM additional_data GROUP BY category;
SELECT corr(y, x) FROM (SELECT y, x FROM additional_data WHERE y IS NOT NULL) AS filtered_data;
SELECT corr(corr_sub.y, corr_sub.x) FROM (SELECT y, x FROM test_data) AS corr_sub;
SELECT corr(a.y, b.x) FROM test_data AS a JOIN compare_data AS b ON a.id = b.group_id;
